zh.lifeSummary: 當Mariotta Glen於大約1372年出生在蘇格蘭時，她的父親Sir John De Glen of Inchmartin and Balmuto24歲，母親Lady Margaret Jardine Erskine Countess of Balmuto19歲。她於大約1391年與Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mariotta Glen于大约1372年出生在苏格兰时，她的父亲Sir John De Glen of Inchmartin and Balmuto24岁，母亲Lady Margaret Jardine Erskine Countess of Balmuto19岁。她于大约1391年与Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Glen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland): habitational name from Glen in Traquair (Peebleshire). The placename is derived from Gaelic gleann ‘glen, valley’.
English: habitational name from a place so called in Leicestershire, so named from an Old English word glean ‘glen, valley’ (from Celtic glinn).
Jewish (Ashkenazic): presumably an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish names.

nameMeanings.name: Mariotta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: pet form of Maria , now occasionally used as a given name in the English-speaking world. In Gaelic Scotland Mar(i)etta is sometimes found as an Anglicized form of Mairead, the Gaelic equivalent of Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Mariotta Glen was born about 1372, in Scotland, her father, Sir John De Glen of Inchmartin and Balmuto, was 24 and her mother, Lady Margaret Jardine Erskine Countess of Balmuto, was 19. She married Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie about 1391, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mariotta Glen est née environ 1372, à Écosse, son père, Sir John De Glen of Inchmartin and Balmuto, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Jardine Erskine Countess of Balmuto, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie environ 1391, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mariotta Glen um 1372 in Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John De Glen of Inchmartin and Balmuto 24 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Jardine Erskine Countess of Balmuto 19. Sie hat um 1391 in Schottland, United Kingdom Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mariotta Glen è nata il circa 1372 nel Scotland, sua padre, Sir John De Glen of Inchmartin and Balmuto, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Jardine Erskine Countess of Balmuto, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie circa 1391, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mariotta Glenが約1372年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Sir John De Glen of Inchmartin and Balmutoは24歳，母Lady Margaret Jardine Erskine Countess of Balmutoは19歳であった。約1391年にイギリススコットランドでSir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリススコットランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mariotta Glen(이)가 대략 1372년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John De Glen of Inchmartin and Balmuto(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Jardine Erskine Countess of Balmuto(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1391년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 스코틀랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mariotta Glen nasceu aproximadamente 1372, em Scotland, seu pai, Sir John De Glen of Inchmartin and Balmuto, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Jardine Erskine Countess of Balmuto, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie aproximadamente 1391, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mariotta Glen родилась около 1372 г. в местности Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John De Glen of Inchmartin and Balmuto было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Jardine Erskine Countess of Balmuto, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie около 1391 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mariotta Glen nació aproximadamente 1372, en Scotland, su papá, Sir John De Glen of Inchmartin and Balmuto, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Jardine Erskine Countess of Balmuto, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie aproximadamente 1391, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en Escocia, Reino Unido.
